temporary_rate_window.note: Rate temporarily raised from 19% to 22% for 2024-2028 as a post-flood reconstruction levy (ZORZFS); scheduled to revert to 19% from 2029.

cit.basis: Corporate income tax (DDPO) under ZDDPO-2; flat 22% for tax years 2024-2028.
cit.minimum_tax_base_note: Minimum tax base rules apply: tax relief and loss carry-forwards may not reduce the tax base below 63% of the pre-relief tax base (effective minimum taxation of 40% of relief-eligible base); not modelled by this SME estimator.
cit.pillar_two_note: Slovenia implemented the EU Pillar Two global minimum tax (Directive (EU) 2022/2523) via ZMDMSPS-1; in-scope groups (revenue >= EUR 750m) face a 15% minimum effective rate via a qualified domestic top-up tax.

vat.note: Standard VAT (DDV) rate 22%; reduced rates 9.5% and 5% (the 5% rate applies to books and publications).

official_sources.name: Finančna uprava Republike Slovenije (FURS, Financial Administration of the Republic of Slovenia)

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Minimum tax base (63% floor), relief, loss carry-forwards, WHT, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
